lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What large object did Nebuchadnezzar build?
What command did the king give about his statue?
answers: Bow down to the statue or be thrown into a fiery furnace
Pray to the statue or go to jail
Leave presents at the feet of the statue

questions.text: Why didn’t Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego bow?
answers: God commands us to worship only him
They thought the statue was ugly

questions.text: What did the three men say to Nebuchadnezzar?
answers: God can rescue us, but even if not, we will not bow
Give us more time to think about it

questions.text: How much hotter was the furnace made?
What happened to the soldiers who threw them into the furnace?
answers: They fell into the fire with them
He saw four men walking in the fire, not tied up

questions.text: Who was the fourth person in the fire?
What was true about the three men after they came out?
answers: They were completely unharmed and didn’t smell like smoke
They were burned to a crisp
Their eyebrows had burned off, but that was it

questions.text: What new order did Nebuchadnezzar give?
answers: Anyone who speaks against the Lord God will be punished
Everyone must bow to the statue
The furnace must be even hotter
Throw Daniel in the fire next
